\u003clanguage\u003e\r"," \u003cterminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003cvalue\u003eISO_639-1\u003c/value\u003e\r"," \u003c/terminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003ccode_string\u003ede\u003c/code_string\u003e\r"," \u003c/language\u003e\r"," \u003cpurpose\u003eZur Darstellung von Details über ein mündliches, schriftliches oder symbolisches Mitteilungsverfahren.\u003c/purpose\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eUnterzeichnung\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eZeichensprache\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eSprache\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eSignatur\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eLautsprecher\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003emündlich\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eschriftlich\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eKompetenz\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eSprechen\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eÜbersetzen\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003einterpretieren\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003cuse\u003eDer Archetyp wird verwendet, um Details über ein mündliches, schriftliches oder symbolisches Mitteilungsverfahren darzustellenn. Der Kontext der Angaben zur Sprache wird durch die übergeordneten Archetypen bereitgestellt, in denen dieser Archetyp verschachtelt ist. Zum Beispiel:\u0026#xD;\r","- um die primäre oder bevorzugte Sprache eines Patienten zu erfassen, verwenden Sie diesen Archetyp im Kontext von CLUSTER.communication;\u0026#xD;\r","- um die bevorzugte oder erforderliche Sprache als Teil einer Dolmetscheranfrage zu erfassen, verwenden Sie CLUSTER.interpreter_requirements;\u0026#xD;\r","- um die von einem Dolmetscher im Rahmen einer klinischen Konsultation verwendete Sprache darzustellen, verwenden Sie diesen Archetyp innerhalb von ACTION.interpretation.\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Verwenden Sie eine separate Instanz dieses Archetyps, um jede Sprache darzustellen, wenn mehrere Sprachen darzustellen werden müssen, z. B. Norwegisch und Suaheli.\u003c/use\u003e\r"," \u003cmisuse\u003eDer Archetyp darf nicht zur Darstellung von Fähigkeiten und Mitteln zum Austausch von Informationen mit einer Einzelperson verwendet werden – verwenden Sie CLUSTER.communication für diesen Zweck.\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Darf nicht verwendet werden, um Details zu einer Anfrage für Dolmetscherdienste darzustellen – verwenden Sie CLUSTER.interpreter_requirements mit einem geeigneten INSTRUCTION-Archetyp, zum Beispiel INSTRUCTION.service_request.\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Darf nicht verwendet werden, um Details zu einer durchgeführten Interpretation darzustellen – verwenden Sie die vorgeschlagene ACTION.interpretation\u003c/misuse\u003e\r"," \u003ccopyright\u003e© openEHR Norway, openEHR Foundation\u003c/copyright\u003e\r"," \u003c/details\u003e\r"," \u003cdetails\u003e\r"," \u003clanguage\u003e\r"," \u003cterminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003cvalue\u003eISO_639-1\u003c/value\u003e\r"," \u003c/terminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003ccode_string\u003ept-pt\u003c/code_string\u003e\r"," \u003c/language\u003e\r"," \u003cpurpose\u003eRegistar pormenores sobre um sistema de comunicação falado, escrito ou simbólico.\u003c/purpose\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003esinalizar\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003elíngua gestual\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003elíngua\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003esinais\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003efalante\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003efalado\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003efalada\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eescrito\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eproficiência\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003ediscurso\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003etraduzir\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003einterpretar\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003cuse\u003eUtilize para registar detalhes sobre um sistema de comunicação falado, escrito ou simbólico. O contexto dos detalhes linguísticos é fornecido pelos arquétipos \"pais\" nos quais este arquétipo está encaixado. Por exemplo:\u0026#xD;\r","- para registar a idioma/língua primária ou preferida de um paciente, utilize este arquétipo no \"contexto\" do CLUSTER.communication;\u0026#xD;\r","- para registar o idioma/língua preferida ou requerida como parte de um pedido de intérprete, utilize CLUSTER.interpreter_requirements;\u0026#xD;\r","- para registar o idioma/língua utilizada por um intérprete no contexto de uma consulta clínica, utilize este arquétipo dentro de ACTION.interpretation.\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Utilize uma instância separada deste arquétipo para registar cada língua no caso de ser necessário registar várias línguas, por exemplo, norueguês e swahili.\u003c/use\u003e\r"," \u003cmisuse\u003eNão deve ser utilizado para registar a capacidade e os meios de troca de informações com um indivíduo - utilize o CLUSTER.communication para este fim.\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Não deve ser utilizado para registar detalhes sobre um pedido de serviços de intérprete - utilize CLUSTER.Interpreter_requirements com um arquétipo \"INSTRUCTION\" adequado, por exemplo INSTRUCTION.service_request.\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Não deve ser utilizado para registar detalhes sobre uma interpretação que foi realizada - utilize ACTION.interpretation.\u003c/misuse\u003e\r"," \u003ccopyright /\u003e\r"," \u003c/details\u003e\r"," \u003cdetails\u003e\r"," \u003clanguage\u003e\r"," \u003cterminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003cvalue\u003eISO_639-1\u003c/value\u003e\r"," \u003c/terminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003ccode_string\u003efi\u003c/code_string\u003e\r"," \u003c/language\u003e\r"," \u003cpurpose\u003ePuhutun, kirjoitetun tai symbolisen viestintätavan yksityiskohtien tallentamiseen.\u003c/purpose\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eviittominen\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eviittomakieli\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eviitottu kieli\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003ekieli\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003emerkki\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003epuhuja\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003epuhuttu\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003ekirjoitettu\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003etaito\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003epuhe\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003ekääntää\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003etulkata\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003etulkkaus\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003cuse\u003eKäytetään yksityiskohtien tallentamiseen puhutusta, kirjoitetusta tai symbolisesta viestintätavasta. Kielen yksityiskohtien asiayhteys sisältyy pääarkkityyppiin, jonka sisällä tätä CLUSTER-arkkityyppiä käytetään. Esimerkiksi jos tarkoituksena on tallentaa tietoja: \u0026#xD;\r","- potilaan ensisijaisesta kielestä, käytetään tätä arkkityyppiä CLUSTER.communication_capability-arkkityypin yhteydessä; \u0026#xD;\r","- suositellusta tai vaaditusta kielestä tulkkipyynnön yhteydessä, käytetään pääarkkityyppinä CLUSTER.interpreter_request-arkkityyppiä.\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Käytä jokaisesta kielestä erillistä instanssia, jos tallennettavana on useita kieliä, esimerkiksi norja ja swahili.\u003c/use\u003e\r"," \u003cmisuse\u003eEi tule hyödyntää tarkoitukseen, jossa tallennetaan tietoja kyvykkyydestä ja keinoista kommunikoida yksilön kanssa. Käytä tällaiseen tarkoitukseen CLUSTER.communication_capability-arkkityyppiä.\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Ei tule käyttää tietojen tallentamiseen liittyen tulkkauspalvelupyyntöihin. Sen sijaan käytä CLUSTER.interpreter_request-arkkityyppiä ja tarkoitukseen sopivaa INSTRUCTION-arkkityyppiä kuten INSTRUCTION.service_request.\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Ei tule käyttää suoritetun tulkkauksen tietojen tallentamiseen.\u003c/misuse\u003e\r"," \u003ccopyright\u003e© openEHR Norway, openEHR Foundation\u003c/copyright\u003e\r"," \u003c/details\u003e\r"," \u003cdetails\u003e\r"," \u003clanguage\u003e\r"," \u003cterminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003cvalue\u003eISO_639-1\u003c/value\u003e\r"," \u003c/terminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003ccode_string\u003enb\u003c/code_string\u003e\r"," \u003c/language\u003e\r"," \u003cpurpose\u003eFor å registrere detaljer om muntlig (tale, tegnspråk) eller skriftlig kommunikasjon.\u003c/purpose\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003etegn\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003etegnspråk\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003etale\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003emorsmål\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003espråk\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003espråkbruk\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003edialekt\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003etaktil\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eblindeskrift\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eskrift\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003emålføre\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003emålform\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eskriftspråk\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eskriftlig\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003cuse\u003eFor å registrere detaljer om muntlig (tale, tegnspråk) eller skriftlig kommunikasjon. Den overordnede arketypen som denne arketypen nøstes i bestemmer konteksten for registreringen av språket. For eksempel:\u0026#xD;\r","- For å registrere et individs primære eller foretrukne språk, bruk denne arketypen i arketypen CLUSTER.communication (Kommunikasjon).\u0026#xD;\r","- For å registrere foretrukket eller påkrevd språk som en del av en forespørsel om tolk, bruk denne arketypen i arketypen CLUSTER.interpreter_requirements (Tolkebehov).\u0026#xD;\r","- For å registrere språket som ble benyttet av en tolk under en klinisk konsultasjon, bruk denne arketypen i arketypen ACTION.interpretation.\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Dersom det er behov for å registrere flere språk - for eksempel norsk og swahili, må arketypen gjentas for hvert språk.\u003c/use\u003e\r"," \u003cmisuse\u003eBrukes ikke for å registrere evne og metoder for utveksling av informasjon med et individ. Bruk arketypen CLUSTER.communication (Kommunikasjon) for dette formålet.\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Brukes ikke for å registrere en forespørsel om tolketjenester. Bruk arketypen CLUSTER.interpreter_requirements (Tolkebehov) sammen med en passende INSTRUCTION-arketype, for eksempel INSTRUCTION.service_request (Helsetjenesteforespørsel).\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Brukes ikke for å registrere detaljer om en tolking som er gjennomført. Bruk arketypen ACTION.interpretation for dette formålet.\u003c/misuse\u003e\r"," \u003ccopyright\u003e© openEHR Norway, openEHR Foundation\u003c/copyright\u003e\r"," \u003c/details\u003e\r"," \u003cdetails\u003e\r"," \u003clanguage\u003e\r"," \u003cterminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003cvalue\u003eISO_639-1\u003c/value\u003e\r"," \u003c/terminology_id\u003e\r"," \u003ccode_string\u003een\u003c/code_string\u003e\r"," \u003c/language\u003e\r"," \u003cpurpose\u003eTo record details about a spoken, written or symbolic system of communication.\u003c/purpose\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003esigning\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003esign language\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003etongue\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003esign\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003espeaker\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003espoken\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003ewritten\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003eproficiency\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003espeech\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003etranslate\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003einterpret\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003cuse\u003eUse to record details about a spoken, written or symbolic system of communication. The context of the language details is provided by the parent archetypes within which this archetype is nested. For example:\u0026#xD;\r","- to record a patient's primary or preferred language, use this archetype within the context of CLUSTER.communication;\u0026#xD;\r","- to record the preferred or required language as part of a request for an interpreter, use CLUSTER.interpreter_requirements;\u0026#xD;\r","- to record the language used by an interpreter within the context of a clinical consultation, use this archetype within ACTION.interpretation.\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Use a separate instance of this archetype to record each language in the situation where multiple languages need to be recorded, for example Norwegian and Swahili.\u003c/use\u003e\r"," \u003cmisuse\u003eNot to be used to record capability and means for exchanging information with an individual - use CLUSTER.communication for this purpose.\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Not to be used to record details about a request for interpreter services - use CLUSTER.Interpreter_requirements with a suitable INSTRUCTION archetype, for example INSTRUCTION.service_request.\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","Not to be used to record details about an interpretation that was performed - use the proposed ACTION.interpretation.\u003c/misuse\u003e\r"," \u003ccopyright\u003e© openEHR Norway, openEHR Foundation\u003c/copyright\u003e\r"," \u003c/details\u003e\r"," \u003cdetails\u003e\r"," \u003c/language\u003e\r"," \u003cpurpose\u003e用于记录关于口头类、书面类或符号类（手势语类；手语类）沟通交流体系的详情。\u003c/purpose\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e手势语\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e使用手势语\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e打手势语\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e手语\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e使用手语\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e打手语\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e符号语言\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e使用符号语言\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e说话方式\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e语言\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e手势\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e符号\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e说话者\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e口语\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e口头\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e口头语\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e口头语言\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e书面\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e书面语\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e书面语言\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e精通\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e熟练程度\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e精通程度\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e讲话\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e说话能力\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e言语\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e翻译\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e书面翻译\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e口头翻译\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003ckeywords\u003e口译\u003c/keywords\u003e\r"," \u003cuse\u003e用于记录关于口头类、书面类或符号类（手势语类；手语类）沟通交流体系的详情。语言详情的语境由其中嵌套此原始型的父原始型提供。 例如：\u0026#xD;\r"," - 用于记录患者的主要语言（第一语言；母语）或首选语言，且应当在沟通交流簇群CLUSTER.communication的语境下使用此原始型；\u0026#xD;\r"," - 用于将首选语言或所要求的语言作为关于口译工作者（口译员；口译译员； 传译员）的请求（申请）的组成部分加以记录，且应当采用口译工作者需求簇群CLUSTER.interpreter_requirements；\u0026#xD;\r"," - 用于在临床就诊/咨询/会诊的语境下记录口译工作者所使用的语言，且应当在口译行动ACTION.interpretation当中使用此原始型。\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","在需要记录多种语言的情况下，应当采用此原始型的单独实例来分别记录每种语言，如挪威语和斯瓦希里语。\u003c/use\u003e\r"," \u003cmisuse\u003e不得用于记录与个人交换信息的能力和手段/方法；对于此种目的，则请采用沟通交流簇群CLUSTER.communication。\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","不用于记录关于口译工作者服务请求（申请）的详情；对于此种目的，则请采用具有合适的指令原始型INSTRUCTION的口译工作者需求簇群CLUSTER.Interpreter_requirements，如服务请求（服务申请；服务项目请求）指令原始型INSTRUCTION.service_request。\u0026#xD;\r","\u0026#xD;\r","不得用于记录关于已经完成的口译服务的详情；对于此种目的，则请采用所建议的口译行动原始型ACTION.interpretation。\u003c/misuse\u003e\r"," \u003cterm_definitions language=\"nb\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0000\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eSpråk\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eSpråk er evnen til å produsere og forstå ytringer som formidler informasjon fra ett individ til et annet, ytringene kan være enten hørbare (tale) eller synlige (tegn, skrift).\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0001\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eNavn på språket\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eNavnet på språket.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"comment\"\u003eFor eksempel Mandarin, swahili, fransk eller norsk tegnspråk. Koding av \"Språknavn\" med en terminologi er ønskelig om mulig. For eksempel ISO 639-3 eller Glottolog. Kodene i ISO 639-3 inneholder både navn på språket men kan også representere navn og modalitet, for eksempel norsk tegnspråk. Verdisettet kan variere med modalitet.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0002\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eVariant\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eNavnet på dialekten eller sosiolekten.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0004\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eKommentar\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eYtterligere fritekstbeskrivelse om språket og eller varianten som ikke er registrert i andre felt.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"comment\"\u003eFor eksempel: Braille brukes for taktil lesing/skriving eller munnavlesning brukes for å gi støtte ved nedsatt hørsel.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0006\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eModalitet\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eMetoden for kommunikasjon av språket.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0007\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eTale\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eSpråket som benyttes ved tale.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0008\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eTegnspråk\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eFysiske handlinger eller bevegelser blir brukt. Denne verdien er ikke relevant om modalitet er definert i elementet \"Navn på språket\". For eksempel norsk tegnspråk.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0009\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eLesing\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eSkriftlige eller trykte bokstaver, ord, bilder eller symboler brukes.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0010\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eSkriving\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eEn sammensetning av bokstaver, ord, bilder eller symboler brukes.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0012\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eTaktil lesing\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eTolkning av skriftlig materiale ved hjelp av berøring brukes.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/term_definitions\u003e\r"," \u003cterm_definitions language=\"en\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0000\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eLanguage\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eA collection of words, their pronunciation and methods for combining them, understood by a specific community and used as a form of communication.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0001\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eLanguage name\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eThe name of the language.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"comment\"\u003eFor example: Mandarin, Swahili, French or Norwegian sign language. Coding of 'Language' with a terminology is preferred, where possible. ISO 639-3 codes include the simple name of the language but can represent the name and modality combined - for example Norwegian sign language. The value set for codes that are appropriate may depend on the mode.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0002\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eVariant\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eThe name of the dialect or sociolect, if appropriate.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0004\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eComment\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eAdditional narrative about the language not captured in other fields.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"comment\"\u003eFor example: Braille is used for tactile reading/writing or lip reading is used to supplement a hearing impairment.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0006\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eMode\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eThe method of communication for the specified language.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0007\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eSpeaking\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eThe voice is used.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0008\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eSigning\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003ePhysical actions or gestures are used. This value is redundant if identification of the mode is a component of the 'Language name', such as 'Norwegian sign language'.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0009\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eReading\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eWritten or printed letters, words, pictures or symbols is used.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0010\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eWriting\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eA composition of letters, words, pictures or symbols is used.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0012\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eTactile reading\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eInterpretation of written material using touch is used.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/term_definitions\u003e\r"," \u003cterm_definitions language=\"zh-cn\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0000\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003e语言\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003e特定社区所能理解并将其作为沟通交流形式的一套词语及其发音和组合方法。\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0001\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003e语言名称\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003e语言的名称\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"comment\"\u003e例如：汉语普通话、斯瓦希里语、法语或挪威手语。 在可能的情况下，应当首选采用标准术语集来编码“语言”。 ISO 639-3代码之中包括语言的简称，但可以表示名称与形态的组合，如挪威手语。 合适的代码取值集合可能会取决于相应的模式。\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0002\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003e语言变体\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003e在合适的情况下，用于记录方言或社会方言（某社会阶层或群体使用的一种语言变体）的名称。\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0004\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003e备注\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003e额外关于其他字段之中并未记录的有关相应语言的文本叙述。\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"comment\"\u003e例如：盲文用于触摸阅读/书写，或者说，唇读用于弥补听力障碍。\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0006\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003e模式\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003e指定语言的沟通交流方法。\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0007\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003e口头模式\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003e采用语音。\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0008\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003e手势语模式\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003e采用的是身体动作或手势（姿势；示意动作）。 如果模式字段的标识已经是“语言名称”字段取值的组成部分，如“挪威手语”，则该取值就属于是多余的。\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0009\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003e阅读模式\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003e采用的是书面的或印刷的字母、字词、图片或符号。\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0010\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003e书面模式\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003e采用的是字母、字词、图片或符号的组合形式。\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0012\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003e触摸阅读模式\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003e采用触摸的方式来解读书面材料。亦可称为“触觉阅读模式”。\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/term_definitions\u003e\r"," \u003cterm_definitions language=\"de\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0000\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eSprache\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eEine Sammlung von Wörtern, ihrer Aussprache und Methoden zu ihrer Kombination, die von einer bestimmten Gemeinschaft verstanden und als Kommunikationsform verwendet werden.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0001\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eSprachenname\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eDer Name der Sprache.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"comment\"\u003eZum Beispiel: Deutsch, Mandarin, Swahili, Französisch oder Norwegische Gebärdensprache. Die Kodierung von „Sprache“ mit einer Terminologie wird nach Möglichkeit bevorzugt. ISO 639-3-Codes enthalten den einfachen Namen der Sprache, können aber den Namen und die Modalität kombiniert darstellen - zum Beispiel die deutsche Gebärdensprache. Der für geeignete Codes festgelegte Wert kann vom Modus abhängen.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0002\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eVariante\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eDer Name des Dialekts oder Soziolekts, falls zutreffend.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0004\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eKommentar\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eZusätzlicher Text über die Sprache, die in anderen Bereichen nicht erfasst wurde.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"comment\"\u003eZum Beispiel: Blindenschrift wird zum taktilen Lesen/Schreiben verwendet oder das Lippenlesen wird verwendet, um eine Hörbehinderung zu ergänzen.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0006\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eModus\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eDie Kommunikationsmethode für die angegebene Sprache.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0007\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eSprechen\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eDie Stimme wird verwendet.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0008\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eZeichen\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eKörperliche Aktionen oder Gesten werden verwendet. Dieser Wert ist redundant, wenn die Identifizierung des Modus Bestandteil des \"Sprachnamens\" ist, wie z. B. 'Norwegische Gebärdensprache'.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0009\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eLesen\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eEs werden geschriebene oder gedruckte Buchstaben, Wörter, Bilder oder Symbole verwendet.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0010\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eSchreiben\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eEs wird eine Zusammensetzung aus Buchstaben, Wörtern, Bildern oder Symbolen verwendet.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0012\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eTaktiles Lesen\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eInterpretation von schriftlichem Material durch Berührung wird verwendet.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/term_definitions\u003e\r"," \u003cterm_definitions language=\"fi\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0000\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eKieli\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eKokoelma sanoja ja äänteitä sekä menetelmiä niiden yhdistämiseksi, mitä tietty yhteisö ymmärtää ja käyttää viestintämuotona.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0001\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eKielen nimi\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eKielen nimi\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"comment\"\u003eEsimerkiksi: kiina, swahili, ranska tai norjalainen viittomakieli. Kielen koodaus terminologialla on suositeltavaa, mikäli mahdollista.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0002\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eMuunnos\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eMurteen tai kielimuodon nimi, jos tarpeellista.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0004\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eKommentti\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eSanallinen lisätieto kielestä, mikä ei tule esille muissa kentissä.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"comment\"\u003eEsimerkiksi: Taktiiliseen lukemiseen käytetään pistekirjoitusta tai huulilta lukemista käytetään kuulovamman takia kommunikoinnin tukena.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0006\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eKäytäntö\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eKommunikointitapa määritetylle kielelle\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0007\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003ePuhuminen\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eKäytetään ääntä.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0008\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eViittominen\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eKäytetään kehon liikkeitä ja ilmeitä (gesturaalisuus). Tieto on tarpeeton, jos käytäntö on tunnistettavissa kielen nimestä kuten ”norjalainen viittomakieli”.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0009\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eLukeminen\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eKäytössä on kirjoitetut ja tulostetut kirjaimet, sanat, kuvat ja symbolit.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0010\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eKirjoittaminen\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eKäytetään kirjainten, sanojen, kuvien ja symbolien yhdistelmää.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0012\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eTaktiilinen lukeminen\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eKäytetään tuntoaistia kirjoitetun materiaalin tulkitsemiseen.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/term_definitions\u003e\r"," \u003cterm_definitions language=\"pt-pt\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0000\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eIdioma\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eUma coleção de palavras, a sua pronúncia e métodos de combinação, compreendidas por uma comunidade específica e utilizadas como forma de comunicação.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0001\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eNome do idioma\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eO nome do idioma.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"comment\"\u003ePor exemplo: mandarim, suaíli, francês ou norueguês. É preferível codificar 'Linguagem' com uma terminologia, sempre que possível. Os códigos ISO 639-3 incluem o nome simples da língua, mas podem representar o nome e a modalidade combinados - por exemplo, a língua gestual norueguesa. O valor definido para os códigos apropriados pode depender do modo.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0002\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eVariante\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eO nome do dialecto ou sociolecto, se apropriado.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0004\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eComentário\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eNarrativa adicional sobre a linguagem/idioma não capturada noutros campos.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"comment\"\u003ePor exemplo: O Braille é utilizado para leitura/escrita tátil ou a leitura labial é utilizada para complementar uma deficiência auditiva.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0006\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eModo\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eO método de comunicação para o idioma especificado.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0007\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eFala\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eA voz é utilizada.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0008\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eSinais\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eAções físicas ou gestos são utilizados. Este valor é redundante se a identificação do modo for um componente do 'Nome do idioma', como por exemplo 'Linguagem de sinais norueguesa'.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0009\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eLeitura\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eLetras escritas ou impressas, palavras, imagens ou símbolos são utilizados.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems code=\"at0010\"\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eEscrita\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"text\"\u003eLeitura tátil\u003c/items\u003e\r"," \u003citems id=\"description\"\u003eA interpretação de material escrito através do toque é utilizada.\u003c/items\u003e\r"," schriftliches oder symbolisches Mitteilungsverfahren darzustellenn. Der Kontext der Angaben zur Sprache wird durch die übergeordneten Archetypen bereitgestellt, in denen dieser Archetyp verschachtelt ist. Zum Beispiel:\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- um die primäre oder bevorzugte Sprache eines Patienten zu erfassen, verwenden Sie diesen Archetyp im Kontext von CLUSTER.communication;\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- um die bevorzugte oder erforderliche Sprache als Teil einer Dolmetscheranfrage zu erfassen, verwenden Sie CLUSTER.interpreter_requirements;\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- um die von einem Dolmetscher im Rahmen einer klinischen Konsultation verwendete Sprache darzustellen, verwenden Sie diesen Archetyp innerhalb von ACTION.interpretation.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","Verwenden Sie eine separate Instanz dieses Archetyps, um jede Sprache darzustellen, wenn mehrere Sprachen darzustellen werden müssen, z. B. Norwegisch und Suaheli.\u0026lt;/\u003cspan class=\"pl-ent\"\u003euse\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;"," \u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-ent\"\u003emisuse\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;Der Archetyp darf nicht zur Darstellung von Fähigkeiten und Mitteln zum Austausch von Informationen mit einer Einzelperson verwendet werden – verwenden Sie CLUSTER.communication für diesen Zweck.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","Darf nicht verwendet werden, um Details zu einer Anfrage für Dolmetscherdienste falado, escrito ou simbólico. O contexto dos detalhes linguísticos é fornecido pelos arquétipos \u0026quot;pais\u0026quot; nos quais este arquétipo está encaixado. Por exemplo:\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- para registar a idioma/língua primária ou preferida de um paciente, utilize este arquétipo no class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","Utilize uma instância separada deste arquétipo para registar cada língua no caso de ser necessário registar várias línguas, por exemplo, class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","Não deve ser utilizado para registar detalhes sobre um pedido de serviços de intérprete - utilize CLUSTER.Interpreter_requirements com um arquétipo \u0026quot;INSTRUCTION\u0026quot; adequado, por exemplo INSTRUCTION.service_request.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","Não deve ser utilizado para registar detalhes sobre uma interpretação que foi realizada - utilize ACTION.interpretation.\u0026lt;/\u003cspan Esimerkiksi jos tarkoituksena on tallentaa tietoja: \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- potilaan ensisijaisesta kielestä, käytetään tätä arkkityyppiä CLUSTER.communication_capability-arkkityypin yhteydessä; \u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- suositellusta tai vaaditusta kielestä tulkkipyynnön yhteydessä, käytetään pääarkkityyppinä CLUSTER.interpreter_request-arkkityyppiä.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","Käytä jokaisesta kielestä erillistä instanssia, jos tallennettavana on useita kieliä, esimerkiksi norja ja swahili.\u0026lt;/\u003cspan class=\"pl-ent\"\u003euse\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;"," \u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-ent\"\u003emisuse\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;Ei tule hyödyntää tarkoitukseen, jossa tallennetaan tietoja kyvykkyydestä ja keinoista kommunikoida yksilön kanssa. Den overordnede arketypen som denne arketypen nøstes i bestemmer konteksten for registreringen av språket. For eksempel:\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- For å registrere et individs primære eller foretrukne språk, bruk denne arketypen i arketypen CLUSTER.communication (Kommunikasjon).\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- For å registrere foretrukket eller påkrevd språk som en del av en forespørsel om tolk, bruk denne arketypen i arketypen CLUSTER.interpreter_requirements (Tolkebehov).\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","- For å registrere språket som ble benyttet av en tolk under en klinisk konsultasjon, bruk denne arketypen i arketypen ACTION.interpretation.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","Dersom det er behov for å registrere flere språk - for eksempel norsk og swahili, må arketypen gjentas for hvert språk.\u0026lt;/\u003cspan class=\"pl-ent\"\u003euse\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;"," \u0026lt;\u003cspan class=\"pl-ent\"\u003emisuse\u003c/span\u003e\u0026gt;Brukes ikke for å registrere evne og metoder for utveksling av informasjon med et individ. Bruk arketypen CLUSTER.communication (Kommunikasjon) for dette formålet.\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","Brukes ikke for å registrere en forespørsel om tolketjenester. Bruk arketypen CLUSTER.interpreter_requirements (Tolkebehov) sammen med en passende INSTRUCTION-arketype, for eksempel INSTRUCTION.service_request (Helsetjenesteforespørsel).\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","Brukes ikke for å registrere detaljer om en tolking som er gjennomført. 用于在临床就诊/咨询/会诊的语境下记录口译工作者所使用的语言，且应当在口译行动ACTION.interpretation当中使用此原始型。\u003cspan class=\"pl-c1\"\u003e\u0026amp;#xD;\u003c/span\u003e","\u003cspan ISO 639-3-Codes enthalten den einfachen Namen der Sprache, können aber den Namen und die Modalität kombiniert darstellen - zum Beispiel die deutsche Gebärdensprache. div.div: <other_contributors>Vebjørn Arntzen, Oslo University Hospital, Norway (openEHR Editor)</other_contributors>
<other_contributors>Silje Ljosland Bakke, Nasjonal IKT HF, Norway (openEHR Editor)</other_contributors>
<other_contributors>Birgitte Bjerkely, Senter for sjeldne diagnoser, OUS, Norway</other_contributors>
<other_contributors>Lisbeth Dahlhaug, Helse Midt - Norge IT, Norway</other_contributors>
<other_contributors>Mikkel Gaup Grønmo, FSE, Helse Nord, Norway</other_contributors>
<other_contributors>Roar Holm, Helse Vest IKT A/S, Norway</other_contributors>
<other_contributors>Lars Ivar Mehlum, Helse Bergen HF, Norway</other_contributors>
<other_contributors>Nils Kolstrup, Skansen Legekontor og Nasjonalt Senter for samhandling og telemedisin, Norway</other_contributors>

<other_contributors>Ian McNicoll, freshEHR Clinical Informatics, United Kingdom</other_contributors>
<other_contributors>Jagan Mohan, Mahatma Gandhi Medical College and Research Institute, India</other_contributors>
<other_contributors>Gro-Hilde Severinsen, Norwegian center for ehealthresearch, Norway</other_contributors>

<other_details id="licence">This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International License. To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/.</other_details>
<purpose>Zur Darstellung von Details über ein mündliches, schriftliches oder symbolisches Mitteilungsverfahren.</purpose>

<use>Der Archetyp wird verwendet, um Details über ein mündliches, schriftliches oder symbolisches Mitteilungsverfahren darzustellenn. Der Kontext der Angaben zur Sprache wird durch die übergeordneten Archetypen bereitgestellt, in denen dieser Archetyp verschachtelt ist. Zum Beispiel:
- um die primäre oder bevorzugte Sprache eines Patienten zu erfassen, verwenden Sie diesen Archetyp im Kontext von CLUSTER.communication;
- um die bevorzugte oder erforderliche Sprache als Teil einer Dolmetscheranfrage zu erfassen, verwenden Sie CLUSTER.interpreter_requirements;
- um die von einem Dolmetscher im Rahmen einer klinischen Konsultation verwendete Sprache darzustellen, verwenden Sie diesen Archetyp innerhalb von ACTION.interpretation.
Verwenden Sie eine separate Instanz dieses Archetyps, um jede Sprache darzustellen, wenn mehrere Sprachen darzustellen werden müssen, z. B. Norwegisch und Suaheli.</use>

<misuse>Der Archetyp darf nicht zur Darstellung von Fähigkeiten und Mitteln zum Austausch von Informationen mit einer Einzelperson verwendet werden – verwenden Sie CLUSTER.communication für diesen Zweck.

Darf nicht verwendet werden, um Details zu einer Anfrage für Dolmetscherdienste darzustellen – verwenden Sie CLUSTER.interpreter_requirements mit einem geeigneten INSTRUCTION-Archetyp, zum Beispiel INSTRUCTION.service_request.
Darf nicht verwendet werden, um Details zu einer durchgeführten Interpretation darzustellen – verwenden Sie die vorgeschlagene ACTION.interpretation</misuse>
<purpose>Registar pormenores sobre um sistema de comunicação falado, escrito ou simbólico.</purpose>

<use>Utilize para registar detalhes sobre um sistema de comunicação falado, escrito ou simbólico. O contexto dos detalhes linguísticos é fornecido pelos arquétipos "pais" nos quais este arquétipo está encaixado. Por exemplo:
- para registar a idioma/língua primária ou preferida de um paciente, utilize este arquétipo no "contexto" do CLUSTER.communication;
- para registar o idioma/língua preferida ou requerida como parte de um pedido de intérprete, utilize CLUSTER.interpreter_requirements;
- para registar o idioma/língua utilizada por um intérprete no contexto de uma consulta clínica, utilize este arquétipo dentro de ACTION.interpretation.
Utilize uma instância separada deste arquétipo para registar cada língua no caso de ser necessário registar várias línguas, por exemplo, norueguês e swahili.</use>
<misuse>Não deve ser utilizado para registar a capacidade e os meios de troca de informações com um indivíduo - utilize o CLUSTER.communication para este fim.

Não deve ser utilizado para registar detalhes sobre um pedido de serviços de intérprete - utilize CLUSTER.Interpreter_requirements com um arquétipo "INSTRUCTION" adequado, por exemplo INSTRUCTION.service_request.
Não deve ser utilizado para registar detalhes sobre uma interpretação que foi realizada - utilize ACTION.interpretation.</misuse>
<purpose>Puhutun, kirjoitetun tai symbolisen viestintätavan yksityiskohtien tallentamiseen.</purpose>

<use>Käytetään yksityiskohtien tallentamiseen puhutusta, kirjoitetusta tai symbolisesta viestintätavasta. Kielen yksityiskohtien asiayhteys sisältyy pääarkkityyppiin, jonka sisällä tätä CLUSTER-arkkityyppiä käytetään. Esimerkiksi jos tarkoituksena on tallentaa tietoja:
- potilaan ensisijaisesta kielestä, käytetään tätä arkkityyppiä CLUSTER.communication_capability-arkkityypin yhteydessä;
- suositellusta tai vaaditusta kielestä tulkkipyynnön yhteydessä, käytetään pääarkkityyppinä CLUSTER.interpreter_request-arkkityyppiä.
Käytä jokaisesta kielestä erillistä instanssia, jos tallennettavana on useita kieliä, esimerkiksi norja ja swahili.</use>

<misuse>Ei tule hyödyntää tarkoitukseen, jossa tallennetaan tietoja kyvykkyydestä ja keinoista kommunikoida yksilön kanssa. Käytä tällaiseen tarkoitukseen CLUSTER.communication_capability-arkkityyppiä.

Ei tule käyttää tietojen tallentamiseen liittyen tulkkauspalvelupyyntöihin. Sen sijaan käytä CLUSTER.interpreter_request-arkkityyppiä ja tarkoitukseen sopivaa INSTRUCTION-arkkityyppiä kuten INSTRUCTION.service_request.
Ei tule käyttää suoritetun tulkkauksen tietojen tallentamiseen.</misuse>
<purpose>For å registrere detaljer om muntlig (tale, tegnspråk) eller skriftlig kommunikasjon.</purpose>

<use>For å registrere detaljer om muntlig (tale, tegnspråk) eller skriftlig kommunikasjon. Den overordnede arketypen som denne arketypen nøstes i bestemmer konteksten for registreringen av språket. For eksempel:
- For å registrere et individs primære eller foretrukne språk, bruk denne arketypen i arketypen CLUSTER.communication (Kommunikasjon).
- For å registrere foretrukket eller påkrevd språk som en del av en forespørsel om tolk, bruk denne arketypen i arketypen CLUSTER.interpreter_requirements (Tolkebehov).
- For å registrere språket som ble benyttet av en tolk under en klinisk konsultasjon, bruk denne arketypen i arketypen ACTION.interpretation.
Dersom det er behov for å registrere flere språk - for eksempel norsk og swahili, må arketypen gjentas for hvert språk.</use>
<misuse>Brukes ikke for å registrere evne og metoder for utveksling av informasjon med et individ. Bruk arketypen CLUSTER.communication (Kommunikasjon) for dette formålet.

Brukes ikke for å registrere en forespørsel om tolketjenester. Bruk arketypen CLUSTER.interpreter_requirements (Tolkebehov) sammen med en passende INSTRUCTION-arketype, for eksempel INSTRUCTION.service_request (Helsetjenesteforespørsel).
Brukes ikke for å registrere detaljer om en tolking som er gjennomført. Bruk arketypen ACTION.interpretation for dette formålet.</misuse>
<purpose>To record details about a spoken, written or symbolic system of communication.</purpose>

<use>Use to record details about a spoken, written or symbolic system of communication. The context of the language details is provided by the parent archetypes within which this archetype is nested. For example:
- to record a patient's primary or preferred language, use this archetype within the context of CLUSTER.communication;
- to record the preferred or required language as part of a request for an interpreter, use CLUSTER.interpreter_requirements;
- to record the language used by an interpreter within the context of a clinical consultation, use this archetype within ACTION.interpretation.
Use a separate instance of this archetype to record each language in the situation where multiple languages need to be recorded, for example Norwegian and Swahili.</use>
<misuse>Not to be used to record capability and means for exchanging information with an individual - use CLUSTER.communication for this purpose.
Not to be used to record details about a request for interpreter services - use CLUSTER.Interpreter_requirements with a suitable INSTRUCTION archetype, for example INSTRUCTION.service_request.
Not to be used to record details about an interpretation that was performed - use the proposed ACTION.interpretation.</misuse>
<purpose>用于记录关于口头类、书面类或符号类（手势语类；手语类）沟通交流体系的详情。</purpose>
<use>用于记录关于口头类、书面类或符号类（手势语类；手语类）沟通交流体系的详情。语言详情的语境由其中嵌套此原始型的父原始型提供。 例如：
- 用于记录患者的主要语言（第一语言；母语）或首选语言，且应当在沟通交流簇群CLUSTER.communication的语境下使用此原始型；
- 用于将首选语言或所要求的语言作为关于口译工作者（口译员；口译译员； 传译员）的请求（申请）的组成部分加以记录，且应当采用口译工作者需求簇群CLUSTER.interpreter_requirements；
- 用于在临床就诊/咨询/会诊的语境下记录口译工作者所使用的语言，且应当在口译行动ACTION.interpretation当中使用此原始型。
在需要记录多种语言的情况下，应当采用此原始型的单独实例来分别记录每种语言，如挪威语和斯瓦希里语。</use>
<misuse>不得用于记录与个人交换信息的能力和手段/方法；对于此种目的，则请采用沟通交流簇群CLUSTER.communication。
不用于记录关于口译工作者服务请求（申请）的详情；对于此种目的，则请采用具有合适的指令原始型INSTRUCTION的口译工作者需求簇群CLUSTER.Interpreter_requirements，如服务请求（服务申请；服务项目请求）指令原始型INSTRUCTION.service_request。
不得用于记录关于已经完成的口译服务的详情；对于此种目的，则请采用所建议的口译行动原始型ACTION.interpretation。</misuse>
<author id="name">Hugo Silva, Vanessa Pereira, Alex Anguelov</author>
<author id="organisation">University of Minho, Luxembourg Institute of Health (LIH), Promptly</author>
<author id="organisation">Oslo universitetssykehus HF, Helse Bergen HF</author>

<items id="description">Språk er evnen til å produsere og forstå ytringer som formidler informasjon fra ett individ til et annet, ytringene kan være enten hørbare (tale) eller synlige (tegn, skrift).</items>

<items id="comment">For eksempel Mandarin, swahili, fransk eller norsk tegnspråk. Koding av "Språknavn" med en terminologi er ønskelig om mulig. For eksempel ISO 639-3 eller Glottolog. Kodene i ISO 639-3 inneholder både navn på språket men kan også representere navn og modalitet, for eksempel norsk tegnspråk. Verdisettet kan variere med modalitet.</items>
<items id="description">Ytterligere fritekstbeskrivelse om språket og eller varianten som ikke er registrert i andre felt.</items>
<items id="comment">For eksempel: Braille brukes for taktil lesing/skriving eller munnavlesning brukes for å gi støtte ved nedsatt hørsel.</items>
<items id="description">Fysiske handlinger eller bevegelser blir brukt. Denne verdien er ikke relevant om modalitet er definert i elementet "Navn på språket". For eksempel norsk tegnspråk.</items>
<items id="description">Skriftlige eller trykte bokstaver, ord, bilder eller symboler brukes.</items>
<items id="description">En sammensetning av bokstaver, ord, bilder eller symboler brukes.</items>
<items id="description">Tolkning av skriftlig materiale ved hjelp av berøring brukes.</items>
<items id="description">A collection of words, their pronunciation and methods for combining them, understood by a specific community and used as a form of communication.</items>

<items id="comment">For example: Mandarin, Swahili, French or Norwegian sign language. Coding of 'Language' with a terminology is preferred, where possible. ISO 639-3 codes include the simple name of the language but can represent the name and modality combined - for example Norwegian sign language. The value set for codes that are appropriate may depend on the mode.</items>
<items id="description">The name of the dialect or sociolect, if appropriate.</items>
<items id="description">Additional narrative about the language not captured in other fields.</items>
<items id="comment">For example: Braille is used for tactile reading/writing or lip reading is used to supplement a hearing impairment.</items>
<items id="description">The method of communication for the specified language.</items>
<items id="description">Physical actions or gestures are used. This value is redundant if identification of the mode is a component of the 'Language name', such as 'Norwegian sign language'.</items>
<items id="description">Written or printed letters, words, pictures or symbols is used.</items>
<items id="description">A composition of letters, words, pictures or symbols is used.</items>
<items id="description">Interpretation of written material using touch is used.</items>
<items id="description">特定社区所能理解并将其作为沟通交流形式的一套词语及其发音和组合方法。</items>
<items id="comment">例如：汉语普通话、斯瓦希里语、法语或挪威手语。 在可能的情况下，应当首选采用标准术语集来编码“语言”。 ISO 639-3代码之中包括语言的简称，但可以表示名称与形态的组合，如挪威手语。 合适的代码取值集合可能会取决于相应的模式。</items>
<items id="description">在合适的情况下，用于记录方言或社会方言（某社会阶层或群体使用的一种语言变体）的名称。</items>
<items id="description">额外关于其他字段之中并未记录的有关相应语言的文本叙述。</items>
<items id="comment">例如：盲文用于触摸阅读/书写，或者说，唇读用于弥补听力障碍。</items>
<items id="description">指定语言的沟通交流方法。</items>
<items id="description">采用的是身体动作或手势（姿势；示意动作）。 如果模式字段的标识已经是“语言名称”字段取值的组成部分，如“挪威手语”，则该取值就属于是多余的。</items>
<items id="description">采用的是书面的或印刷的字母、字词、图片或符号。</items>
<items id="description">采用的是字母、字词、图片或符号的组合形式。</items>
<items id="description">采用触摸的方式来解读书面材料。亦可称为“触觉阅读模式”。</items>

<items id="description">Eine Sammlung von Wörtern, ihrer Aussprache und Methoden zu ihrer Kombination, die von einer bestimmten Gemeinschaft verstanden und als Kommunikationsform verwendet werden.</items>

<items id="comment">Zum Beispiel: Deutsch, Mandarin, Swahili, Französisch oder Norwegische Gebärdensprache. Die Kodierung von „Sprache“ mit einer Terminologie wird nach Möglichkeit bevorzugt. ISO 639-3-Codes enthalten den einfachen Namen der Sprache, können aber den Namen und die Modalität kombiniert darstellen - zum Beispiel die deutsche Gebärdensprache. Der für geeignete Codes festgelegte Wert kann vom Modus abhängen.</items>
<items id="description">Der Name des Dialekts oder Soziolekts, falls zutreffend.</items>
<items id="description">Zusätzlicher Text über die Sprache, die in anderen Bereichen nicht erfasst wurde.</items>
<items id="comment">Zum Beispiel: Blindenschrift wird zum taktilen Lesen/Schreiben verwendet oder das Lippenlesen wird verwendet, um eine Hörbehinderung zu ergänzen.</items>
<items id="description">Die Kommunikationsmethode für die angegebene Sprache.</items>

<items id="description">Körperliche Aktionen oder Gesten werden verwendet. Dieser Wert ist redundant, wenn die Identifizierung des Modus Bestandteil des "Sprachnamens" ist, wie z. B. 'Norwegische Gebärdensprache'.</items>
<items id="description">Es werden geschriebene oder gedruckte Buchstaben, Wörter, Bilder oder Symbole verwendet.</items>
<items id="description">Es wird eine Zusammensetzung aus Buchstaben, Wörtern, Bildern oder Symbolen verwendet.</items>
<items id="description">Interpretation von schriftlichem Material durch Berührung wird verwendet.</items>
<items id="description">Kokoelma sanoja ja äänteitä sekä menetelmiä niiden yhdistämiseksi, mitä tietty yhteisö ymmärtää ja käyttää viestintämuotona.</items>
<items id="comment">Esimerkiksi: kiina, swahili, ranska tai norjalainen viittomakieli. Kielen koodaus terminologialla on suositeltavaa, mikäli mahdollista.</items>
<items id="description">Murteen tai kielimuodon nimi, jos tarpeellista.</items>
<items id="description">Sanallinen lisätieto kielestä, mikä ei tule esille muissa kentissä.</items>
<items id="comment">Esimerkiksi: Taktiiliseen lukemiseen käytetään pistekirjoitusta tai huulilta lukemista käytetään kuulovamman takia kommunikoinnin tukena.</items>
<items id="description">Käytetään kehon liikkeitä ja ilmeitä (gesturaalisuus). Tieto on tarpeeton, jos käytäntö on tunnistettavissa kielen nimestä kuten ”norjalainen viittomakieli”.</items>
<items id="description">Käytössä on kirjoitetut ja tulostetut kirjaimet, sanat, kuvat ja symbolit.</items>
<items id="description">Käytetään kirjainten, sanojen, kuvien ja symbolien yhdistelmää.</items>
<items id="description">Uma coleção de palavras, a sua pronúncia e métodos de combinação, compreendidas por uma comunidade específica e utilizadas como forma de comunicação.</items>

<items id="comment">Por exemplo: mandarim, suaíli, francês ou norueguês. É preferível codificar 'Linguagem' com uma terminologia, sempre que possível. Os códigos ISO 639-3 incluem o nome simples da língua, mas podem representar o nome e a modalidade combinados - por exemplo, a língua gestual norueguesa. O valor definido para os códigos apropriados pode depender do modo.</items>
<items id="description">O nome do dialecto ou sociolecto, se apropriado.</items>
<items id="description">Narrativa adicional sobre a linguagem/idioma não capturada noutros campos.</items>
<items id="comment">Por exemplo: O Braille é utilizado para leitura/escrita tátil ou a leitura labial é utilizada para complementar uma deficiência auditiva.</items>
<items id="description">O método de comunicação para o idioma especificado.</items>

<items id="description">Ações físicas ou gestos são utilizados. Este valor é redundante se a identificação do modo for um componente do 'Nome do idioma', como por exemplo 'Linguagem de sinais norueguesa'.</items>
<items id="description">Letras escritas ou impressas, palavras, imagens ou símbolos são utilizados.</items>
<items id="description">Composição de letras, palavras, imagens ou símbolos são utilizados.</items>
<items id="description">A interpretação de material escrito através do toque é utilizada.</items>
